# .github/

## Purpose
GitHub configuration including CI/CD workflows and repository assets.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI workflows (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |
| `assets/` | Repository assets (LiveKit logo image) |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Workflow changes affect CI — test locally before pushing
- Do NOT modify workflows unless explicitly requested
